name: align-rtl
title: Align RTL
description: Paste selected text as right-aligned rich RTL content in editors that need paragraph-level RTL alignment.
author: jberrebi

commands.name: index
commands.title: Align RTL
commands.subtitle: Paste right-aligned rich RTL content
commands.description: Paste selected text or clipboard content with a rich HTML RTL payload for paragraph-level right alignment.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
